from enum import Enum
from typing import Literal


class LogLevel(str, Enum):
    DEBUG = "debug"
    INFO = "info"
    WARNING = "warning"
    ERROR = "error"


class SortOrder(str, Enum):
    ASC = "asc"
    DESC = "desc"


class OutputFormat(str, Enum):
    JSON = "json"
    XML = "xml"
    CSV = "csv"


class CachePolicy(str, Enum):
    NO_CACHE = "no_cache"
    SHORT = "short"
    LONG = "long"


def configure_logging(level: LogLevel) -> None:
    if level == LogLevel.DEBUG:
        print("Setting debug level")
    elif level == LogLevel.INFO:
        print("Setting info level")
    elif level == LogLevel.WARNING:
        print("Setting warning level")
    elif level == LogLevel.ERROR:
        print("Setting error level")


def set_sort_order(order: SortOrder) -> list:
    if order == SortOrder.ASC:
        return [1, 2, 3]
    elif order == SortOrder.DESC:
        return [3, 2, 1]
    return []


def apply_format(fmt: OutputFormat, data: str) -> str:
    if fmt == OutputFormat.JSON:
        return f'{{"data": "{data}"}}'
    elif fmt == OutputFormat.XML:
        return f"<data>{data}</data>"
    elif fmt == OutputFormat.CSV:
        return f"data\n{data}"
    return data
